message:
fix: add .iter() calls for slice iteration in paragraph accessibility

Lines() returns &[Line], not an iterator. Chain .iter().map() instead
of .map() directly on the slice reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -821,8 +821,10 @@ impl ftui_a11y::Accessible for Paragraph<'_> {
         let name: String = self
             .text
             .lines()
+            .iter()
             .map(|line| {
                 line.spans()
+                    .iter()
                     .map(|span| span.content.as_ref())
                     .collect::<Vec<_>>()
                     .join("")
